steps.title: Recognize the operation
steps.content:
20% greater than 60 means the new number is 120% of the original, or 1.20 times the original. We need to calculate:
$$60 \times 1.20$$

steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content:
$$60 \times 1.20 = 72$$
The multiplier $1.20$ includes the original 60 plus the additional 20%, so B is correct.
